recipes.title: Creamy Egg Sandwich
directions: Boil 5 eggs in water for 5 minutes.
Separate egg whites and yolks. Use all 5 whites and only 2 yolks.
Prepare the cream by mixing 2 boiled yolks, 15g light mayo, 70g light yogurt, 1 tsp black pepper, 1/4 tsp salt, 1/2 tsp garlic powder, and dill.
Cut the 5 egg whites into small pieces and place in a bowl.
Add the cream mixture and mix well.
Toast two slices of bread in a medium heated pan.
Place lettuce, egg mixture, and cream on the toast.
Add a pinch of paprika and serve.
tips: You can add any type of vegetables you like.

recipes.title: Feky's Egg Sandwich
directions: Boil 2 eggs in water for 8 minutes.
Smash the 2 eggs in a bowl.
Prepare the sauce by mixing light yogurt, light mayo, ketchup, black pepper, salt, vinegar, and lemon juice.
Add the sauce to the eggs and mix.
Toast two slices of bread in a medium heated pan.
Place lettuce and the egg mixture between the toasts.
tips: You can add any type of vegetables you like.
